queries.question: Provide me with the research technique that is common for all projects.
queries.sql: SELECT Research_Techniques.technique_name  from Projects_Research_Techniques join Research_Techniques on Projects_Research_Techniques.technique_id = Research_Techniques.id join Projects on Projects_Research_Techniques.project_id = Projects.id   GROUP BY Projects_Research_Techniques.technique_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Projects_Research_Techniques.project_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Projects)

queries.question: List the research technique description for all projects.
queries.sql: SELECT Research_Techniques.description  from Projects_Research_Techniques join Research_Techniques on Projects_Research_Techniques.technique_id = Research_Techniques.id join Projects on Projects_Research_Techniques.project_id = Projects.id   GROUP BY Projects_Research_Techniques.technique_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Projects_Research_Techniques.project_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Projects)

queries.question: List the research technique description for all projects.
queries.sql: select projects.project_name , research_techniques.description from Projects_Research_Techniques join Research_Techniques on Projects_Research_Techniques.technique_id = Research_Techniques.id join Projects on Projects_Research_Techniques.project_id = Projects.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?project_name ?description WHERE {
  ?projects_research_techniques a :Projects_Research_Techniques .
  ?research_techniques a :Research_Techniques .
  ?projects_research_techniques p:hasResearch_Techniques ?research_techniques .
  ?projects a :Projects .
  ?projects_research_techniques p:hasProjects ?projects .
  ?projects p:project_name ?project_name .
  ?research_techniques p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: which research techniques are utilized for each project?
queries.sql: select projects.project_name , research_techniques.technique_name from Projects_Research_Techniques join Research_Techniques on Projects_Research_Techniques.technique_id = Research_Techniques.id join Projects on Projects_Research_Techniques.project_id = Projects.id

queries.question: For every project, list information on research techniques used (names and descriptions).
queries.sql: select projects.project_name , research_techniques.technique_name , research_techniques.description from Projects_Research_Techniques join Research_Techniques on Projects_Research_Techniques.technique_id = Research_Techniques.id join Projects on Projects_Research_Techniques.project_id = Projects.id

queries.question: What information is there on research techniques all projects use (names and descriptions)?
queries.sql: SELECT Research_Techniques.technique_name, Research_Techniques.description  from Projects_Research_Techniques join Research_Techniques on Projects_Research_Techniques.technique_id = Research_Techniques.id join Projects on Projects_Research_Techniques.project_id = Projects.id   GROUP BY Projects_Research_Techniques.technique_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Projects_Research_Techniques.project_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Projects)
